title: koanophyllon coixtlahuacum
intro: Koanophyllon coixtlahuacum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the coixtlahuacum daisy. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Koanophyllon coixtlahuacum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
